REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS JAMES NAIFY, GEORGE RAAD, LORRAINE RAAD AND HANFORD-FREUND & COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND IN PART. 1.DEMURER BASED ON STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER ADDRESSES ONLY SOME ALLEGATIONS OF THE COMPLAINT RE: STATUTE OF LIMIATIONS AND DOES NOT ADDRESS ALL THE ALLEGATIONS GIVING RISE TO PLAINTIFF'S CAUSES OF ACTION. SEE PARAGRAPH 27 OF SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. 2.DEMURRER TO UCL CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. 3.DEMURER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED - NEGLIGENCE PER SE, ELDER ABUSE, AGE DISCRIMINATION AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS ARE SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED (D501)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ppearances:
Joyce Jordan Esq. (415-846-3180) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Olin Hill.
Farheena Habib, Esq. (415-403-4458) for Defendant/Moving party JAMES NAIFY, GEORGE RAAD, LORRAINE RAAD and HANFORD-FREUND & COMPANY's.

The Court announces the tentative ruling on the 2 motions. Parties are ordered into the hallway to contemplate the tentative rulings.

Defendant argues age discrimination, intentional infliction of emotional distress and elder abuse. Plaintiff has nothing to add. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS JAMES NAIFY, GEORGE RAAD, LORRAINE RAAD and HANFORD-FREUND & COMPANY's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED in part and sustained without leave to amend in part.
1.Demurer based on Statute of Limitations is OVERRULED. Defendant's demurrer addresses only some allegations of the complaint re: Statute of Limiations and does not address all the allegations giving rise to Plaintiff's causes of action. See paragraph 27 of Second Amended Complaint. 2.Demurrer to UCL cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. 3.Demurer is otherwise overruled - Negligence per se, elder abuse, age discrimination and Intentional Infliction of Emotional distress are sufficiently alleged. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff Olin Hills Second Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joyce Jordan Esq. (415-846-3180) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Olin Hill.
Farheena Habib, Esq. (415-403-4458) for Defendant/Moving party JAMES NAIFY, GEORGE RAAD, LORRAINE RAAD and HANFORD-FREUND & COMPANY's.

The Court announces the tentative ruling on the 2 motions. Parties are ordered into the hallway to contemplate the tentative rulings.

Defendant argues age discrimination, intentional infliction of emotional distress and elder abuse. Plaintiff has nothing to add. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS JAMES NAIFY, GEORGE RAAD, LORRAINE RAAD and HANFORD-FREUND & COMPANY's Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff Olin Hills Second Amended Complaint is DENIED. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges facts giving rise to the request for punitive damages. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
